Package tools.spirals.cerberus237.adaptationactionsbase.core

Interface IAdaptationAction

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractDockerAction, ExecCommandAction, KillContainerAction, PauseContainerAction, RemoveContainerAction, RestartContainerAction, ScaleInAction, ScaleOutAction, StartContainerAction, StopContainerAction, UnpauseContainerAction, UpdateResourcesAction
    public interface IAdaptationAction
    The IAdaptationAction interface defines a contract for classes that represent an action to be performed as part of an adaptation process.

    Implementing classes must provide an implementation of the perform method to define the specific action to be executed.

    Author:
    Arléon Zemtsop (Cerberus)

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      boolean canPerform()
      Checks if this action can be performed given the current system state.
      String getActionId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this adaptation action.
      String getDescription()
      Returns a human-readable description of this adaptation action.
      AdaptationActionResult perform()
      Performs the adaptation action.
      AdaptationActionResult rollback()
      Rolls back the adaptation action if possible.
      boolean supportsRollback()
      Checks if this action supports rollback.

    • Method Detail

      • perform

        AdaptationActionResult perform()
        Performs the adaptation action.

        This method contains the logic to execute the specific action defined by the implementing class.

        Returns:
        the result of the adaptation action execution

      • getActionId

        String getActionId()
        Returns the unique identifier of this adaptation action.
        Returns:
        the action identifier

      • getDescription

        String getDescription()
        Returns a human-readable description of this adaptation action.
        Returns:
        the action description

      • canPerform

        boolean canPerform()
        Checks if this action can be performed given the current system state.
        Returns:
        true if the action can be performed, false otherwise

      • rollback

        AdaptationActionResult rollback()
        Rolls back the adaptation action if possible.

        This method attempts to revert the changes made by the perform method. Not all actions support rollback.

        Returns:
        the result of the rollback operation

      • supportsRollback

        boolean supportsRollback()
        Checks if this action supports rollback.
        Returns:
        true if rollback is supported, false otherwise
